questions.text: Which major battle is the primary subject of Surah Al-Anfal?
How does Allah describe the reaction of true believers when His name is mentioned?
questions.answer: Their hearts feel fear (tremble), and when His verses are recited, it increases them in faith (Iman).

questions.text: How did Allah assist the believers during the Battle of Badr according to Verse 9?
questions.answer: He reinforced them with a thousand angels, rank upon rank.

questions.text: What is the meaning of the phrase 'You did not throw when you threw, but it was Allah who threw' (Verse 17)?
questions.answer: It refers to the Prophet (SAW) throwing a handful of dust at the enemy, signifying that the ultimate cause and effect of victory belong to Allah.

questions.text: Who are described as 'the worst of living creatures' in the sight of Allah?
questions.answer: Those who are 'deaf and dumb' (spiritually) and do not use their intellect/reason.

questions.text: What is the ruling for the distribution of the 'Ghanimah' (spoils of war)?
questions.answer: One-fifth (Khums) belongs to Allah, the Messenger, his kin, orphans, the needy, and the traveler.

questions.text: What is the condition for Allah to stop punishing a people while they are doing it?
questions.answer: Allah will not punish them while they are seeking His forgiveness (Istighfar).

questions.text: How many patient believers can overcome how many disbelievers according to the final verses?
questions.answer: Initially, 20 could overcome 200; later, with Allah's lightening of the burden, 100 patient ones can overcome 200.

questions.text: What is the 'Anfal' (bounty) intended to be for the believers besides physical wealth?
questions.answer: The purification of their hearts and the strengthening of the bond between them through obedience to Allah.
